subheadings.heading: Discovery Approaches
content: **Passive**: Collects subdomains from third-party aggregators and historical datasets. Ultra-fast but may include stale records.
**Active**: Verifies subdomain existence through direct DNS resolution or probe responses.
**Bruteforce**: Systematic DNS querying using curated wordlists (e.g., Assetnote, n0kovo).
**Permutations**: Generates new candidates by altering known subdomains using patterns (e.g., AlterX, Altdns).

subheadings.heading: Benchmark Data
content: [Original 2020 Benchmark Results (Google Sheets)](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1Fa_dv4jnMCDcpa_RQy12TpEZQNo1l8KsDFJscPjnePo/edit?usp=sharing)
Core Resources: [Trickest Resolvers](https://github.com/trickest/resolvers), [Assetnote Wordlists](https://wordlists.assetnote.io/).

subheadings.heading: Top Picks by Category
subheadings.content:
| Category | Recommended Tools | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| **Passive** | subfinder, amass | subfinder for speed, amass for depth |
| **Active/Resolution** | dnsx, puredns | puredns for large-scale massdns backend |
| **Bruteforce** | puredns, gobuster | puredns is modern standard for accuracy |
| **Alterations** | alterx, gotator | alterx is the modern standard |
| **All-in-One** | [reconftw](https://github.com/six2dez/reconftw) | Full automated discovery pipeline |

subheadings.heading: The ProjectDiscovery Ecosystem
content: **dnsx**: Multi-purpose DNS toolkit that replaced many legacy Python utilities.
**alterx**: Modern permutation generator with powerful pattern support.
**tlsx**: Advanced certificate transparency and TLS property scanner.
**uncover**: API-driven discovery across multiple passive search engines.

subheadings.heading: Amass - The Deep Scanner
content: **Pros**: Unrivaled third-party API integrations (AlienVault, Shodan, etc.); creates a complete asset graph.
**Cons**: Slower execution; high resource overhead; complexity of configuration flags.

subheadings.heading: Subfinder - The Passive King
content: **Pros**: Extremely fast; uses 35+ services; active development; clean JSON/text output.
**Cons**: May occasionally miss deeply buried subdomains that Amass captures.

subheadings.heading: Puredns - The Resolver Benchmark
content: **Pros**: Massive throughput using `massdns`; handles wildcard detection natively; high accuracy.
**Cons**: Requires high-quality resolver lists to maintain performance.

subheadings.heading: Execution Pipeline
content: # 1. Passive Discovery
subfinder -d target.com -all -o passive.txt
# 2. Targeted Bruteforce
puredns bruteforce wordlist.txt target.com -r resolvers.txt -w brute.txt
# 3. Resolution & Cleanup
cat passive.txt brute.txt | sort -u | puredns resolve -r resolvers.txt -w alive.txt
# 4. Permutation Analysis
cat alive.txt | alterx | puredns resolve -r resolvers.txt -w final_subs.txt

subheadings.heading: Pro-Tips for 2025
content: Use `dnsx -retry 3` to handle transient network issues when resolving large lists.
Periodically update your `resolvers.txt` using Trickest's public datasets for maximum throughput.
Leverage `katana -jc` to find subdomains hidden in JavaScript files and comments.
